sn14.27:1.1:
1
At Sāvatthī.
"Bhikkhus, it is by way of elements that beings come together and unite. Those who destroy life come together and unite with those who destroy life; those …
… who are covetous … who bear ill will … of wrong view come together and unite with those of wrong view.
sn14.27:1.2:
2
"Those who abstain from the destruction of life …
… who are uncovetous … without ill will … of right view come together and unite with those of right view."
